title: Describe a chart simply
subtitle: Talk about numbers without panic.
overview: B1 charts need trend words, not advanced statistics.

items.es: El número de estudiantes ha aumentado este año.
items.en: The number of students has increased this year.
The price went down in March.

items.es: La diferencia no es muy grande.
items.en: The difference is not very big.

items.es: En general, la tendencia es positiva.
items.en: In general, the trend is positive.

items.es: No tengo todos los datos, pero la idea principal está clara.
items.en: I do not have all the data, but the main idea is clear.
